title: Salesforce node returns no output with dynamic expression
symptom: The Salesforce node outputs 'No output data returned' when using a dynamic expression for the SOQL WHERE clause, despite the query working with a hardcoded ID.
applies_when: Dynamic expression for SOQL WHERE clause
not_this_if: Hardcoded ID works in the Salesforce node
Query works in Salesforce Developer Console
root_cause: The dynamic expression may not be correctly passing the value from the previous node due to timing or data type issues. In this case, the Salesforce node was not receiving the expected input from the preceding webhook node.
fix_steps: Add a Code node before the Salesforce node to log and verify the incoming data.
Ensure that the data being passed is in the correct format and is not null or undefined.
Check if any additional conditions in Salesforce (like triggers or flows) are affecting the output.
agent_instruction: Add a Code node to verify the incoming data before the Salesforce node.
